g.text: The internal data structure uses

text.font-family: "Noto Sans", Helvetica, OpenSans, Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR

g.text: integer triplets, and Z for the vertical

text.font-family: "Noto Sans", Helvetica, OpenSans, Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR

g.text: axis, while Three.js is using floats and

text.font-family: "Noto Sans", Helvetica, OpenSans, Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR

g.text: Y as the vertical axis. Since the

text.font-family: "Noto Sans", Helvetica, OpenSans, Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR

g.text: coordinates are passed around as

text.font-family: "Noto Sans", Helvetica, OpenSans, Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR

g.text: primitives this is easy to miss. Please

text.font-family: "Noto Sans", Helvetica, OpenSans, Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR
